summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No PR has complete merge preflight proof: mergeability is unknown and no passed clean Codex /review evidence is present. #80805 and #80889 also have waiting-on-author labels; #80805 is broad enough to require maintainer judgment.

actions.reason: Broad code delta, waiting-on-author status, unresolved bot-review proof, and missing merge preflight make this a maintainer decision rather than a merge or repair recommendation.
The PR looks plausibly mergeable after maintainer review, but the artifact lacks the required merge preflight proof for an automated merge recommendation.
Waiting-on-author plus compatibility-risk config/runtime changes require maintainer judgment before merge or repair; no concrete replacement fix path is justified from the artifact.
The PR may be a good maintainer-review candidate, but session-state risk and missing required merge preflight block an automated merge recommendation.
The diff is narrow, but automated merge still lacks the required clean Codex /review, mergeability, and merge preflight evidence.

needs_human: #80805: maintainer judgment required for broad multi-surface PR with waiting-on-author label and unresolved bot-review/preflight proof.
#80818: maintainer review or fresh merge preflight required; no clean Codex /review proof in artifact.
#80889: maintainer judgment required for compatibility-risk compaction config/runtime change with waiting-on-author label.
#80916: maintainer review or fresh merge preflight required for session-state memory-core change.
#80929: maintainer review or fresh merge preflight required despite narrow diff, because required merge proof is missing.
